# hostinger_reach_contacts (Data Source)

Lists email marketing contacts from the Hostinger Reach API.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `group_uuid` (String) Filter contacts by group UUID
- `subscription_status` (String) Filter contacts by subscription status

### Read-Only

- `contacts` (Attributes List) The list of email marketing contacts. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--contacts))

<a id="nestedatt--contacts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `contacts`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String) Email address of the contact.
- `name` (String) First name of the contact.
- `note` (String) Note of the contact.
- `source` (String) Source of the contact.
- `subscribed_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp of when the contact subscribed.
- `subscription_status` (String) Subscription status of the contact. Possible values: `subscribed`, `unsubscribed`.
- `surname` (String) Last name (surname) of the contact.
- `uuid` (String) Unique identifier of the contact.
